sourcesContent:
export const adminDashboardDesign = {
  colors: {
    primary: '#4f46e5',
    bg: '#f8fafc',
    surface: '#ffffff',
    text: '#1e293b',
    textLight: '#64748b',
    border: '#e2e8f0',
    overlay: 'fixed inset-0 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm z-40 lg:hidden',
  },

  layout: {
    wrapper: 'flex min-h-screen bg-slate-50',

    navbar:
      'sticky top-0 z-30 h-16 flex items-center justify-between gap-4 px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 ' +
      'bg-white border-b border-slate-200 shadow-sm',

    body: 'relative flex flex-1',

    sidebar:
      'fixed inset-y-0 left-0 z-20 ' +
      'w-[85vw] max-w-[360px] lg:w-64 xl:w-72 ' +
      'bg-slate-900 text-slate-100 ' +
      'flex flex-col ' +
      'transform transition-transform duration-300 ease-in-out ' +
      'lg:translate-x-0 ' +
      '-translate-x-full ' +
      'lg:static lg:shadow-none ' +
      'shadow-2xl shadow-black/40 ' +           // shadow only on mobile when open
      'lg:border-r lg:border-slate-800 ' +
      'overflow-y-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-slate-700',

    content:
      'flex-1 overflow-y-auto bg-slate-50 ' +
      'p-5 sm:p-6 lg:p-8 ' +
      'lg:pl-[17rem] xl:pl-[18.5rem]',          // offset content when sidebar is fixed
  },

  navbar: {
    menuButton:
      'lg:hidden p-2 -ml-2 text-slate-600 hover:text-slate-900 rounded-md focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500',

    title: 'hidden lg:block text-xl font-semibold text-slate-800 tracking-tight',

    search:
      'flex-1 max-w-md px-4 py-2 rounded-lg border border-slate-300 bg-slate-50 ' +
      'text-sm placeholder-slate-400 focus:outline-none focus:border-indigo-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-200 transition-all',

    avatarButton:
      'flex items-center gap-3 p-1.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-slate-100 transition-colors',
  },

  dropdown: {
    wrapper:
      'absolute right-4 top-14 w-64 bg-white rounded-xl shadow-xl border border-slate-200 py-2 z-50',

    header: 'px-4 py-3 border-b border-slate-100 flex flex-col gap-0.5',

    item:
      'flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-2.5 text-sm text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50 hover:text-indigo-700 cursor-pointer transition-colors',

    danger:
      'flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-2.5 text-sm text-red-600 hover:bg-red-50 hover:text-red-700 cursor-pointer transition-colors',
  },

  sidebar: {
    header: 'lg:hidden px-6 py-6 border-b border-slate-800 flex items-center justify-between',

    brand: 'flex flex-col',

    logo: 'text-2xl font-bold text-white tracking-tight',

    subtitle: 'text-sm text-indigo-300 mt-1 font-medium',

    closeBtn:
      'text-slate-300 hover:text-white text-2xl p-2 rounded-full hover:bg-slate-800/50 transition-colors',

    nav: 'flex flex-col gap-1.5 mt-6 lg:mt-8 px-3',

    navItem:
      'flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 rounded-lg text-base lg:text-sm font-medium ' +
      'transition-colors cursor-pointer hover:bg-slate-800/70 hover:text-white',

    navItemActive: 'bg-indigo-800/30 text-indigo-300 border-l-4 border-indigo-500',
  },
};
